interactions.name: navigation-flyout
interactions.delta: Clicking the hamburger expands a full-width dark (neutral-950) overlay panel that grows downward from the top of the page, pushing/revealing the rounded white page below. The hamburger icon morphs into an X inside a circular neutral-800 button. Header inverts to dark theme: logo + 'Contact us' button become white-on-dark. The panel contains a 2-column x 2-row grid of huge nav links (Our Work, About Us, Our Process, Blog ~ text-5xl/text-7xl Mona Sans), separated by neutral-800 hairline borders, followed by a two-column footer-style block: 'Our offices' (Copenhagen, Billund addresses) and 'Follow us' (Facebook, Instagram, GitHub, Dribbble icon links). Clicking X collapses it. Implemented in source via Framer Motion layout animation on RootLayout.

interactions.name: logo-hover
interactions.delta: On hover the logomark's inner rect animates width 0 -> 8 (fills the arrow glyph) over 300ms (group-hover/logo:w-8 transition-all duration-300).

interactions.name: entrance-animations
interactions.delta: Framer Motion FadeIn: content blocks fade up (opacity 0 -> 1, translateY 24px -> 0) on load and as sections enter viewport, staggered. Client logos / case-study rows / list items animate in sequence. Hero rounded-top page reveal.
